description.value:
A long-hafted weapon with a spiked iron head, combining reach with brutal impact. The spike punches through armor while the weight of the head shatters bones and bends steel.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Melee d8, Bludgeoning
BasicTwo-Handed, Reach, Melee d10, Bludgeoning or Piercing, Brace, Punch, Sunder, Wound
MasterTwo-Handed, Reach, Melee d10, Bludgeoning or Piercing, Brace, Punch, Sunder (enhanced), Wound
Master PerkWhen an enemy fails their save against Sunder, their AC is reduced by your STR modifier (minimum 1) instead of the standard amount.

rmeData.masterPerk: When an enemy fails their save against Sunder, their AC is reduced by your STR modifier (minimum 1) instead of the standard amount.
